latHint: Think an extra clause tacked onto something - not a passenger.
pivHint: Every subway car has RIDER passengers - but a 'RIDER' attached to a contract adds something on top. What word means that addition?
winText: An EXTRA add-on. RIDER was the pivot - subway passenger to a contract's EXTRA clause.
lossText: EXTRA - an additional clause or add-on. RIDER was the pivot: subway RIDER to a contract's RIDER.
